# desec Provider

The deSEC provider manages DNS zones and resource record sets using the [deSEC DNS API](https://desec.io).

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "desec" {
  api_token = "your-desec-api-token"
  # api_url = "https://desec.io/api/v1"  # optional, defaults to the deSEC production API
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_token` (String, Sensitive) The deSEC API token. Can also be set via the `DESEC_API_TOKEN` environment variable.
- `api_url` (String) The deSEC API base URL. Defaults to `https://desec.io/api/v1`. Can also be set via the `DESEC_API_URL` environment variable. Override this for testing.
